name: petition@voteforlinda.com
subject: Save Medicare and Social Security!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Mitch McConnell has made it clear that Republicans are targeting these programs next. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181023_McConnell_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter, Mitch McConnell last week made it clear: **the Republican Party wants to cut Medicare and Social Security at all costs.**

As reported by the _Los Angeles Times_ : _McConnell identified "entitlements" \-- that's Washington code for Social Security, Medicare __and_ _Medicaid -- as "the real drivers of the debt" and called for them to be adjusted "to the demographics of the future."_ **[Add your name and tell the Republicans to STAY AWAY from Social Security and Medicare>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036695/4ac3d62d/6a07d6e7/1ce29ead/2289686115/VEsE/ "https://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/rtw_181023_pet?source=RTW_181023_McConnell_EM")** | | ******[ADD YOUR NAME](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036695/4ac3d62d/6a07d6e7/1ce29ea2/2289686115/VEsF/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/rtw_181023_pet?source=RTW_181023_McConnell_EM")******
---
Mitch McConnell, Paul Ryan, and their followers in Congress want to cut Social Security and Medicare and blame it on the federal deficit -- a deficit that ballooned due to the Republican tax bill.

Republicans stand for one thing: lower taxes for the rich at any cost. Whether that means cutting your Social Security benefits, raising the taxes on the middle class, or implementing regressive tax policies on low-income individuals -- it means more for them, and less for you.

**We 're going to stop them. **[**Stand with us. Stand up for Social Security and Medicare. Add your name >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036695/4ac3d62d/6a07d6e7/1ce29ead/2289686115/VEsC/ "https://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/rtw_181023_pet?source=RTW_181023_McConnell_EM")

Thanks!

Team Sanchez
**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181023_McConnell_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

You can contribute to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez by [**donating here.**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036695/4ac3d62d/6a07d6e7/1ce29ea3/2289686115/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ls_support?refcode=footer&amount=25.00&recurring=auto")
Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. Still support Linda but want fewer emails? **[Go here](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036695/4ac3d62d/6a07d6e7/1ce29ea0/2289686115/VEsB/ "https://secure.voteforlinda.com/page/signup/linda-sanchez-lite")** to sign up to receive less email from our campaign. [**Click here**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036695/4ac3d62d/6a07d6e7/1ce29ea1/2289686115/VEsO/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list.

PO Box 59660
Norwalk, CA 90652

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: We weren't the only ones watching tonight's debate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Stacey Abrams WON tonight's debate against Brian Kemp. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa715/34a064cc/19e76fc/70d5c91/735934514/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, If you didn't watch, here's an update: Stacey Abrams WON tonight's debate against Brian Kemp. She proved once again that she is the _only_ candidate with real plans to lead Georgia forward. But if you think this race is a done deal, think again. Georgia Republicans were watching that debate, too. They could see their chance slipping away, and they sure as hell won't back down without a fight. **We need to gear up for the fight of our lives if we're going to win in 14 days. Join us on the front lines by chipping in $3 now. We don't have time to waste.** **[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa715/34a064cc/19e76fc/70d5c9e/735934514/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDIzMjAxOC4zLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10232018.3-full")** After Stacey's strong debate performance tonight, Brian Kemp is about to enter full-on attack mode - it's just a question of when and if we'll be ready to fight back. One missed opportunity could be the difference between winning or losing in 14 days. **We are in a fight for our lives** , and millions of Georgia voters still haven't cast their ballots. The gloves are officially off, and Kemp and his allies will sink to new lows to defeat us. So I'm asking: **[It's time for all of us to leave it all on the field for Stacey Abrams. Please donate $3 right now to help us get out every vote.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa715/34a064cc/19e76fc/70d5c9e/735934514/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDIzMjAxOC4zLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10232018.3-full")** Thank you for standing with us. There's no question that we can win this race - but only if we fight for Stacey Abrams as hard as she'll fight for us. Let's do this, \- Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager
#TeamAbrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa715/34a064cc/19e76fc/70d5c9e/735934514/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDIzMjAxOC4zLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10232018.3-full")**

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Team -- Game. On.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
| | Our debate just finished. Two words are going through my head right now: Game on. Ted Budd made clear his agenda has nothing to do with what's good for families in North Carolina -- and everything to do with what's good for special interests. It's time for him to pack it up and come home. I was feeling really good, until Tori told me that we're not likely to hit our Debate Day goal. [**We still have a few hours to get to our 500 supporter goal before midnight. Can you give ASAP?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542790a/e3b7d3/5e8b9e35/25555948/2169510794/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181023pm?refcode=kme181023pm_m") Let's get to work! Kathy | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542790a/e3b7d3/5e8b9e35/25555948/2169510794/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181023pm?refcode=kme181023pm_m")
---
_\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Kathy Manning
Subject: What are you up to tonight?_
---
**I will be facing Rep. Ted Budd in my first debate tonight.**
While I share my vision for North Carolina, Ted Budd will certainly be doing rhetorical gymnastics to defend his special interest-first agenda.
We're setting up a Debate Day goal to show how many of us are fighting against the Budd agenda. [**Will you be one of the 500 supporters we need to give before midnight? Any amount will get us closer to that goal.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542790a/e3b7d3/5e8b9e35/25555948/2169510794/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181023pm?refcode=kme181023pm_m")
Budd and his special interest allies are spending huge sums of money against me. It averages out to tens of thousands of dollars __a day.__
But you know what? **None of that spending will help Ted Budd on that debate stage tonight.**
When you're at a podium answering questions, you can't hide behind attack ads. Your special interest allies can't grab the microphone and answer for you. Tonight, it's Budd, me, a moderator, and our ideas. I can't wait.
Of course, once I'm out of the debate, all that spending comes back into play. **That's where this Debate Day goal comes in.**
[**Be one of the 500 supporters we need to fight beside this campaign before midnight.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542790a/e3b7d3/5e8b9e35/25555948/2169510794/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181023pm?refcode=kme181023pm_m")
I'll make you proud tonight. Thanks for standing with me.
Kathy

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542790a/e3b7d3/5e8b9e35/2555594f/2169510794/VEsD/ "https://manning.bsd.net/unsubscribe") [www.kathymanning2018.com](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542790a/e3b7d3/5e8b9e35/2555594e/2169510794/VEsA/ "https://www.kathymanning2018.com/")

name: Ryan Mulcahy
subject: FW: I need your help, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
We have entered the final two weeks of this race, and as the Republicans claim momentum, our actions over the next several days will be critical.
Friends, I hope you can take a moment to read Tom's note below. Because we have entered the final two weeks of this race, and as the Republicans claim momentum, our actions over the next several days will be critical. We can't afford to leave anything on the table -- and with [**your support**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer="), we won't. [**Make a donation today to help us in this final stretch if you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") It's going to be a fight until the end, but we're going to win this thing in 14 days because of you. Thanks, Ryan Mulcahy Campaign Manager \-----forwarded message----- From: Tom O'Halleran Subject: I need your help, friend _I need your help today, friend._ _**As of today, we are exactly 2 weeks out from Election Day.**_ And I'm reaching out because this race is very tight, and I cannot close this race strong and keep AZ-01 blue alone. Just in the past week, a**Republican Super PAC released a poll** showing that our race is tied, and right-wing **Steve Bannon came to Arizona** to campaign with Wendy Rogers. The GOP is pulling out all the stops to defeat me and hold on to control of the House, _and I am counting on you to make sure they do not succeed._ [**Will you make a donation today, friend, to keep AZ-01 blue?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") My team has set an ambitious goal of [**100 grassroots donations** **today**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") to equip my team with the resources we need to enter these final two weeks strong. | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$25](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$50](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [Other](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I want to thank you for **[your continued support,](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **friend. I am the most vulnerable Democrat in the House and we can take nothing in this race for granted, and this community of grassroots supporters has kept us going strong.

Now, with only 14 days to go, I hope you will stay with our team until the polls close on November 6th. [**Make a donation today if you can, and thank you.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Yours,

Tom

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

name: Team Tabitha
subject: Have you seen Tabitha's Ads on TV?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/Logos/Logo3.PNG]

Our first TV ad began airing on Monday, and we are proud as a peanut of how it's been received.

In Tabitha's first TV commercial, she expresses her frustration at extremists on both sides of the aisle who are so busy arguing that they forget there are real people's lives at stake. Our problems are shared, so let's look for solutions that will serve ALL Americans.
Watch it here: https://youtu.be/qLywaPfjZTw [https://youtu.be/qLywaPfjZTw

We've got ads scheduled to air on WDHN, WTVY, WRGX, WAKA, WNCF, & WSFA... plus A&E, Bravo, CNN, Food Network, HGTV, Lifetime, TLC, Hallmark, MSNBC, Travel, TNT, and USA. But we don't yet have the saturation we need to reach every voter. And we're not yet reaching every corner of this MASSIVE 10,000 square mile district.

Our polling shows that when people learn about Tabitha, they like her. So this media attention could make all the difference, but only if people see it! Each ad costs about $75 to air, so your gift will have a visible impact.

Please donate $75 to put one more ad on the air!

Montgomery, AL 36106

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: We need to elect women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
Friends,
We need to elect more women.
**With Justice Kavanaugh 's confirmation, a woman's right to safe, legal abortion is at risk.** We can't let women's rights go backward, which is why we need to support candidates for governor like Molly Kelly who will take action to protect women's reproductive rights in New Hampshire. **[Rush $5 now to elect Molly and protect women's health.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne4molly?refcode=jtk928-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
We can't depend on Molly's opponent to champion women. **He called Planned Parenthood "bullies" and cast the deciding vote to defund the organization.** Molly will stand with Planned Parenthood every single day as governor. **[Will you donate $5 right now to stand up for Planned Parenthood?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne4molly?refcode=jtk928-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
We can trust Molly to stand with women because she always has. It's time New Hampshire once again had a champion for women in the corner office. **[Rush a $5 donation to flip this seat blue.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne4molly?refcode=jtk928-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Sen. Jeanne Shaheen
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Shaheen for Senate email list, please click here.](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=UU3BEnbPJKUmwrfE95HUPq%2B6eiVTdgrd&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.democratsenators.org%2Fo%2F23%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2F%3FEmail%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible.
clean_body: Friends, We need to elect more women. With Justice Kavanaugh 's confirmation, a woman's right to safe, legal abortion is at risk. We can't let women's rights go backward, which is why we need to support candidates for governor like Molly Kelly who will take action to protect women's reproductive rights in New Hampshire. We can't depend on Molly's opponent to champion women. He called Planned Parenthood "bullies" and cast the deciding vote to defund the organization. Molly will stand with Planned Parenthood every single day as governor. We can trust Molly to stand with women because she always has. It's time New Hampshire once again had a champion for women in the corner office. Thank you, Sen. Jeanne Shaheen

subject: Trump Administration Launches Program for Moms, Babies with Opioid Withdrawal
body:
| |
---
# _Trump Administration Launches Program for Moms, Babies with Opioid Withdrawal_
“The Trump administration is launching a program to help states care for pregnant women who are using opioids and for their babies who are born dependent on the drugs,” Kimberly Leonard writes in the _Washington Examiner_. “The Maternal Opioid Misuse program, or the ‘M-O-M model,’ will work with state Medicaid programs to help set up services for pregnant women who are dependent on opioids and their infants, who can develop [a] condition known as neonatal abstinence syndrome.” [**Click here to continue reading.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2Njg1NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjY4NTUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1MjExJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/policy/healthcare/trump-administration-launches-program-for-moms-babies-with-opioid-withdrawal) In [_**The Daily Signal**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2Njg1NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjY4NTUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1MjExJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.dailysignal.com/2018/10/23/government-economists-offer-window-into-what-a-socialist-us-economy-would-look-like), Fred Lucas writes that a new report from the White House Council of Economic Advisers provides a glimpse into how the U.S. economy would crumble under socialist policies. “The study found that if Medicare-for-all were financed out of current federal spending—without additional borrowing or tax increases—it would eat up more than half of the entire federal budget.” “Homeland Security officials said Tuesday that among the thousands of migrants heading for the United States border are some ‘gang members’ and people with ‘significant criminal histories,’” Paulina Dedaj reports for **[Fox News](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2Njg1NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjY4NTUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1MjExJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.foxnews.com/us/some-in-caravan-have-significant-criminal-histories-from-regions-including-mideast-dhs-says)**. Department Spokesperson Tyler Houlton said that the caravan includes people from the Middle East, Africa, South Asia, and elsewhere. “With a caravan of over 7,000 Central Americans making their way to the Southern border of the United States, it is more important than ever that our political leaders support our border and immigration personnel,” the [_**Boston Herald**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2Njg1NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjY4NTUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1MjExJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&http://www.bostonherald.com/opinion/editorials/2018/10/editorial_caravan_proves_the_need_for_ice) editorial board writes. “There is a potential crisis unfolding at our border with Mexico. Law enforcement is all that stands between total lawlessness and criminality.” The [_**Investor’s Business Daily**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2Njg1NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjY4NTUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1MjExJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.investors.com/politics/editorials/economic-boom-trump-obama/) editorial board writes that former President Obama has trouble with facts these days, as he’s “running around this week trying to take credit for the economic boom.” But facts are stubborn things: As soon as President Trump took office, “he started reversing as many of Obama's economic policies as he possibly could.” The conclusion should be simple for President Obama: “When it comes to today's economic boom, you didn't build that.” “The Space Force is poised for launch,” Ledyard King writes for [_**USA Today**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2Njg1NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjY4NTUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1MjExJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2018/10/23/space-force-trump-administration-details-trajectory-pentagon-plan/1739251002/). “At a meeting Tuesday of the National Space Council which he chairs, Vice President Mike Pence began laying out more of the milestones needed to establish what would be the nation's first new armed service since 1947.” The Vice President told the Council that “the time has come to write the next great chapter in the history of the Armed Forces of the United States.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2Njg1NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjY4NTUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1MjExJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2Njg1NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjY4NTUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1MjExJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2Njg1NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjY4NTUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1MjExJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Bob Corney, Team Bredesen
subject: See for yourself
body:
|
#
Peter -- Right now at the 24 field offices we’ve opened with Tennessee Victory 2018, our volunteers are working hard to get voters to the polls to vote early. I need your help, friend.
Our last end-of-month deadline before Election Day is right around the corner. But time's running out to hit our critical $65,000 end-of-month goal, and right now, we're falling short.

name: Update from Team Kaine
subject: Corey Stewart truly believes he is going to win on November 6th.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
"Internal polls are showing Corey Stewart within single digits of Tim Kaine" ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d433/3976888130/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | [**" Internal polls are showing Corey Stewart within single digits of Tim Kaine"**
_\- Corey Stewart Campaign, October 2018_

**New goal to increase Democratic turnout: $80,000
Deadline: October 31, 2018**

Our extreme opponent raised over $1 million last quarter and we cannot afford to miss any goals. We need you to donate before the month ends - can you step up today?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d432/3976888130/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+ldquoInternal+polls+are+showing+Corey+St&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")
---
| [**YES, I CAN HELP TODAY**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d431/3976888130/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+YES+I+CAN+HELP+TODAY&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")
---
This month Corey Stewart dialed up his attacks on Tim, throwing everything but the kitchen sink at him. **And in the last three months, he raised over $1 million.** The attacks against Tim are increasing and Corey's close internal polling has him oozing confidence -- _Corey Stewart truly believes he is going to win on[November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d430/3976888130/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")_

**We know it 's hard to believe, but this is not the time to take anything for granted. Right now Republicans in the Senate are seriously considering trying to repeal the Affordable Care Act and take strikes at Social Security.** [Handing them a victory like Corey Stewart? That's not something this country can afford. Which is why we're fighting back with this new emergency goal.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d437/3976888130/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Handing+them+a+victory+like+Corey+Stewar&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d436/3976888130/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")
We just have this one goal for the rest of the month, and missing it is not an option. **Can you add an emergency donation of $5 or more to make sure we don 't fall behind on this deadline?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d435/3976888130/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")
---
| [**DONATE $25**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d434/3976888130/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d40b/3976888130/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")
---
| [**DONATE $100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d40a/3976888130/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")
---
| [**DONATE $250**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d409/3976888130/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+DONATE+250&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d408/3976888130/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")
---
This isn't just about Tim's Senate seat (although keeping that is a REALLY big deal). Corey's negative statements hurt candidates down the ballot, like House candidates who are a point away from the Republicans they are challenging.

A tightening race for Tim could mean a loss for any of these House districts. And if we don't pick up seats in Virginia, we won't take back the House and will have to watch powerlessly as Republicans sabotage the ACA, cut Social Security, and do so much more damage.

**We are now six days away from the deadline to request an absentee ballot and seven days away from our final October fundraising deadline. It 's now or never, please help with whatever you can:**
[**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d40f/3976888130/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=13+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")
---
If we do this right, we can wake up on [November 7th, 2018](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d40e/3976888130/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+November+7th+2018&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND") ten steps forward -- _not backwards._

Thanks for reading,

_Team Kaine_

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Emergency-October-Goal](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d40d/3976888130/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=15+-+httpssecuretimkainecomEmergencyOctoberGo&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")

However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c1/3e0906/74a93202/3e37d400/3976888130/VEsEBQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=20+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND&source=20181024_1_FR_TEAM_intro-EOM-LDND")

subject: Claire is coming to St. Joseph!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCaskill for Missouri
body:
Friend,
Claire will be in St. Joseph on Saturday for our "Fighting for You" tour, where she's visiting many of the places she's held town halls over the past two years, and wants you to be there!
**Saturday, October 27
Callison Hall, 1222 South 10th Street, St. Joseph, MO
9:30 AM
[Click here to RSVP!](http://wfc2.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Ls4m%2FDT%2BNL2Ox5%2FBaz62vOmwg2e8Lpgw&url=https%3A%2F%2Faction.clairemccaskill.com%2Fp%2Fdia%2Faction4%2Fcommon%2Fpublic%2F%3Faction_KEY%3D10880)**
Claire is fighting tooth and nail to defend our healthcare from the GOP's relentless attacks. She's giving it her all to protect workers' rights. And she's working hard to get dark money the hell out of our politics. You in?
[**With just 13 days until the election, it 's time to give it our all. Join Claire on Saturday as we fight for Missouri together!**](http://wfc2.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7w%2BrzMu%2FdWoGdPajnKEMGemwg2e8Lpgw&url=https%3A%2F%2Faction.clairemccaskill.com%2Fp%2Fdia%2Faction4%2Fcommon%2Fpublic%2F%3Faction_KEY%3D10880)
--Team Claire

name: Kim Howard, Team Morse
subject: BREAKING: we're within 4 points of catching McClintock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UJE9OY0rVl7JFy--1euvng-2A_e9tzXOOlUWZnot_Lc=/3jSREshpTB6SEIBOyiy6U3aXwAZUd8tV6quNzHVS8Lc=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_201801024_KH_20181024-adzomb_nopnr_logo)
Thirteen days to go, Peter, and **our new poll shows we 're just 4 points away from catching McClintock.**
_Victory is within reach._ But only one thing will close this gap--we need to push harder than ever in these final two weeks. To do that, we need to get our third ad on the air by the end of this week.
Right now, we don't *quite* have the resources to buy that airtime--but with the way this team always steps up, we know we can do it.
**We 're in striking distance of beating McClintock on November 6th--but to get our newest message on the air and close our polling gap, we need resources. Can you rush us a contribution now?**

**" 12 Laxalt family members oppose Laxalt for Nevada governor. Here's why, in their own words"**
--_Reno Gazette-Journal_ , Oct. 22, 2018

Friend --

Twelve (12!) of Adam Laxalt's family members disapprove of his bid to become Nevada's next governor.

That's right: twelve concerned members of the Laxalt family wrote an op-ed for the Reno Gazette-Journal letting Nevadans know why Adam is wrong for our state.

**[Join hundreds of thousands of Nevadans-- including a dozen members of the Laxalt family -- and support Steve Sisolak's campaign with a donation of $12 or more today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/bnmOGKfAFoeZNCe4VXf_-01K1sl8IZTDdjdzI9d5Wkw=/nO2VMYLInMOLikXsv4im-IHQE8CKnIv55XDm9By5MzA=?gpsid=37_57_4670&refcode=em18_181024_12lax_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_12lax_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

[DONATE $60](https://act.myngp.com/el/bnmOGKfAFoeZNCe4VXf_-01K1sl8IZTDdjdzI9d5Wkw=/nO2VMYLInMOLikXsv4im-IHQE8CKnIv55XDm9By5MzA=?gpsid=37_57_4670&refcode=em18_181024_12lax_X3_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_12lax_X3_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&express_lane=true&amount=60)
[DONATE $120](https://act.myngp.com/el/bnmOGKfAFoeZNCe4VXf_-01K1sl8IZTDdjdzI9d5Wkw=/nO2VMYLInMOLikXsv4im-IHQE8CKnIv55XDm9By5MzA=?gpsid=37_57_4670&refcode=em18_181024_12lax_X4_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_12lax_X4_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&express_lane=true&amount=120)
[DONATE OTHER](https://act.myngp.com/el/bnmOGKfAFoeZNCe4VXf_-01K1sl8IZTDdjdzI9d5Wkw=/nO2VMYLInMOLikXsv4im-IHQE8CKnIv55XDm9By5MzA=?gpsid=37_57_4670&refcode=em18_181024_12lax_X5_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_12lax_X5_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
Read more about why the Laxalts are speaking out against Adam's campaign:

_" If [Adam Laxalt] responds to this column at all, it will probably be to say that he hardly knows the people writing this column. And in many ways that would be true. We never had a chance to get to know him, really -- he spent his life in Washington, D.C., while we lived in Northern Nevada and grew up in public schools and on public lands. He moved to Nevada in 2013 so that he could lean on the reputation of a family that he hardly knew while tapping into support by donors who had no interest in our state or its people.

"It's worth saying that this column isn't about politics. We would be proud to have a Laxalt running for office on Nov. 6, regardless of whether they were Republican or Democrat or independent, so long as we believed that they would be good for Nevada. We're writing because we care about Nevada and because we know the truth about this candidate. We think that you should, too."_

It's clear that Adam Laxalt is wrong for Nevada. But we still need your help to fight back against the out-of-state special interests trying to buy this election for him.

**[Would you consider rushing a contribution to Steve's campaign today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/bnmOGKfAFoeZNCe4VXf_-01K1sl8IZTDdjdzI9d5Wkw=/nO2VMYLInMOLikXsv4im-IHQE8CKnIv55XDm9By5MzA=?gpsid=37_57_4670&refcode=em18_181024_12lax_L2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_12lax_L2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Team Sisolak

name: Mel Hall
subject: It’s no secret that Congress is broken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Congress may be broken, friend, but I don't think it's beyond repair.

If we elect representatives to Congress who reject special interests and put their constituents first, we can fix the mess in Washington and get our government working for Hoosiers again.

If we put partisanship aside and listen to the hardworking people in places like Elkhart, South Bend, Winamac, and Peru, there are no problems too big for us to solve together.

[_**In Congress, I 'll lift up your voice and be a champion for Hoosiers every day. Donate $5 or whatever you can contribute to help me flip this seat.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/5lfHWjIkvldcOwbwEBsNBdTg4v3wMSbqnxTkY4If-sc=/JcDJcL5P8cI8IkhLrMrs7_XtcyhpCcE2iZYAeDvxR34=?refcode=em181024)

All Hoosiers deserve leaders who will stand with them when it matters most. But here in the 2nd District, our representative has sided with corporate interests and voted to deny health care to Hoosiers with pre-existing conditions 11 times.

Mel

name: Elijah Cummings
subject: High expectations
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Why I'm supporting Ben Jealous.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37972f/7ab0e2c4/7e6c7513/349857eb/1353601309/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-cummings?refcode=OHQ10248A") Friend, Popularity is a funny thing. I've heard Governor Hogan is a popular guy, and I can't help but bristle. Popularity doesn't really mean a lot -- or anything -- if you lack the courage to use that popularity to make people's lives better. That's why I'm supporting my friend Ben Jealous for our next governor of Maryland. He's the fighter, visionary, and leader we need to take Maryland into the future stronger, more equal, and safer than it's ever been. [**We have a chance to make history by electing Maryland's first black governor, so I hope you'll join me today in supporting his campaign with a donation of $5 or more right now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37972f/7ab0e2c4/7e6c7513/349857eb/1353601309/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-cummings?refcode=OHQ10248A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37972f/7ab0e2c4/7e6c7513/349857ea/1353601309/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-cummings?refcode=OHQ10248A&amount=5&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$25 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37972f/7ab0e2c4/7e6c7513/349857d5/1353601309/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-cummings?refcode=OHQ10248A&amount=25&express_lane=true")

---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37972f/7ab0e2c4/7e6c7513/349857d7/1353601309/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-cummings?refcode=OHQ10248A&amount=100&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37972f/7ab0e2c4/7e6c7513/349857d6/1353601309/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-cummings?refcode=OHQ10248A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37972f/7ab0e2c4/7e6c7513/349857d1/1353601309/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-cummings?refcode=OHQ10248A&express_lane=true")
---
As a civil rights leader, community organizer, and former president of the NAACP, Ben has spent his life bringing people together to get big things done. As a businessman, he invested in people and companies, and helped them thrive here in Maryland. He is running on a platform of Medicare-for-All, clean energy, a stronger, more equal economy, and an end to mass incarceration.
That platform is why I'm so excited about his campaign: He has high expectations of government.
The people of Baltimore can't keep paying taxes without getting anything back. And they're sure not getting anything from Larry Hogan. Folks here have been feeling the squeeze in their communities for generations, and my friend Ben gets it.
He gets the pain, the frustration, the disappointment -- but he understands that we can do even better. When Ben won his primary, the first thing I did was open my checkbook. Because I wanted to invest in his vision.
I invested in this campaign because no matter what comes next in Washington, I want to know that there is a Ben Jealous working to make Maryland a state of high expectations.
[**I'm ready to make history if you are -- so join me in investing in Maryland's destiny. Donate $5 or more today to help elect Ben Jealous as our next governor of Maryland.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37972f/7ab0e2c4/7e6c7513/349857eb/1353601309/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-cummings?refcode=OHQ10248A")
Thanks,
Elijah Cummings

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37972f/7ab0e2c4/7e6c7513/349857eb/1353601309/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-cummings?refcode=OHQ10248A")
---

Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37972f/7ab0e2c4/7e6c7513/349857d3/1353601309/VEsHBw/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. name: Zack Malitz, betofortexas.com
subject: Proof that our hard work is paying off
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

We’ve been sending a lot of emails lately, and I want you to know why.

We’re organizing the largest ‘get out the vote’ campaign in Texas history
and one of the biggest of its kind for a U.S. Senate race, ever. And the
record-breaking results during Early Voting this week have shown that our
hard work is paying off.

It takes a ton of time and resources to pull this off: our field team is
working day and night to support tens of thousands of volunteers, tools
and materials for hundreds of pop-up offices -- and yes, we send a lot of
emails to ask enough people to join us and pull it off.

With all the organizing we’ve been doing, we’re behind on hitting our
fundraising goal for this final month before November. This is a
make-or-break period.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181024&t=1019&akid=20910%2E444211%2EJf0IOI ]We only have a few days left to meet our fundraising goal, and we’re
still short. Can we count on you to help us hit our goal with
a contribution of
$3?

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181024&t=1020&akid=20910%2E444211%2EJf0IOI ]Contribute
$3
»

Even though we keep breaking records in grassroots fundraising and the
official reports show that Beto is outraising Ted Cruz, this does not
count all the super PAC money lined up in Cruz’s corner. He’s got eleven
outside groups at his back.

Our opponent isn’t doing the kind of grassroots organizing that we are.
And he can call on his external, special-interest ties any time he needs
money.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181024&t=1021&akid=20910%2E444211%2EJf0IOI ]Ours is a grassroots campaign, funded by thousands of people
responding to emails like this one. I hope you’ll help by pitching in
today.

The outcome of this election will impact millions of lives across the
country. We have a chance to build a brighter future, rather than a darker
one. Let’s not hesitate to take it.

Thank you for everything,

Zack Malitz
Field Director
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181024&t=1022&akid=20910%2E444211%2EJf0IOI ]Contribute
$3
»

[ ]Ours is a grassroots campaign, funded by thousands of people responding to emails like this one. I hope you’ll help by pitching in today. The outcome of this election will impact millions of lives across the country. We have a chance to build a brighter future, rather than a darker one. Let’s not hesitate to take it. Thank you for everything, Zack Malitz Field Director Beto for Texas [ ]Contribute $3 » Contribute to Beto's campaign:

---|---|---

Peter,

In the run-up to next month’s critical midterm elections, **we are seeing a resurgence of Republican voter suppression.**

Voter rolls are being purged, voter ID laws are being rolled out, polling places in communities of color are being moved or closed, and some members of the GOP are using racial or political bases to prevent a person from turning in their ballot.

None of this should ever be commonplace in a democracy like ours. With early voting underway in many states across the U.S., including here in Illinois, it’s time to get thousands of voices on the record on this.
**We want to know: Should the government be doing more to protect the right to vote?**
| [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2814266/17744183/1949954103?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODM4ODNlYS1iY2Q3LWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfXMqVBvczkwH7p69ow5KxLwA4Gno-jHHr7ShdoGBcQ=&refcode=DL_EM_SV_90DO_181022_1_1_yes&amount=5&recurring=auto&refcode2=b83883ea-bcd7-e811-8607-281878391efb) | | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2814267/17744184/1949954103?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODM4ODNlYS1iY2Q3LWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfXMqVBvczkwH7p69ow5KxLwA4Gno-jHHr7ShdoGBcQ=&refcode=DL_EM_SV_90DO_181022_1_1_no&amount=5&recurring=auto&refcode2=b83883ea-bcd7-e811-8607-281878391efb)

Tonight, the leader of the free world will touch down right here in Wisconsin to assist me in my efforts to send Senator Baldwin packing and.....
****

Friend,

Tonight, the leader of the free world will touch down right here in Wisconsin to assist me in my efforts to send Senator Baldwin packing and restore the Wisconsin Way in Washington.

President Trump has without a doubt felt the effects of Baldwin’s obstruct and resist agenda.

First, Baldwin sided with the most liberal wing of her party to promote a complete and total government takeover of healthcare that will:
* Eliminate Medicare and Medicare Advantage for our seniors,
* Eliminate Tricare for our veterans,
* And eliminate employer insurance for 3.4 million Wisconsinites.

Then, she voted against Justice Kavanaugh without even taking a meeting with him. How can we stand for another day of her in office?

It’s clear, friend, Tammy Baldwin will stop at nothing to derail the President’s America First agenda. And now he’s fired up to replace her with a true ally in the Senate.

Before tonight's rally, I’ll have the chance to speak with the President.

I, for one, have a lot to say. But I’m more interested in what you, the people of Wisconsin, want to tell him. [**Will you write the President a note?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=be5925dd59b6422e904e0b9972d728e3&_e=DL3ESNTI1_-Y09e94PhgGVSNC9QVV229oPLJGggGsAoSACdG6VA50PmIvyJ20MQMlx_qv2jgVHRUx2HZ0aMEAdulaipy1xJzB4VKo6W1TNsq0gX7o4TG8bP7SeLDlqqdWLy89HxWqoVWfqwdtoB3_z9__cClnkddedRk977JRtMozEb2c8WUAcPYrBzEI0se5RzmhiegF74CjNfnqdcbrf56LUI0Tjev1qeSi94SHn1fA673fZzoWF56CriZj2rtr23klfj2XkC4fj2H-R8x0KPs8nfhpUqIsLkP41cyt9wsIGUvM5c6uBLK5tZLOuoXGBK5TTnakMqxpwr44Kie6F1RsP85lpwMC8EZ77t4vz6FyhPWRBSi3d26HnBAsjMwhbQN7zH55ckpiWF-mGDYsr24fCwFd-Q0WVFk2nZz0jpKt4mWRKluEd4hvIrJT1Px)

**[SHARE A MESSAGE WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=be5925dd59b6422e904e0b9972d728e3&_e=DL3ESNTI1_-Y09e94PhgGVSNC9QVV229oPLJGggGsAoSACdG6VA50PmIvyJ20MQMlx_qv2jgVHRUx2HZ0aMEAdulaipy1xJzB4VKo6W1TNsq0gX7o4TG8bP7SeLDlqqdWLy89HxWqoVWfqwdtoB3_z9__cClnkddedRk977JRtMozEb2c8WUAcPYrBzEI0se5RzmhiegF74CjNfnqdcbrUJHfrZJYgyIpwA4WE0mbJ9yyQbGQdbuVDrN1R4Zuo_mtyUrHCAgIXuflzcVpyopKk2pmXDKjw63DlnMfU2PUsDF_-tFU6it0ZebcXeyPauvquuAgCPXWg5fRMR_QkcWpQFyxa_vGndoxEcSO8ZD_1QM9MZnxfhVmIKqT3VpCqbFXyWaKeGQqmQzN3ptE-_2AcuqAX3FfjztnPIahWXMnWoN_arpReMFGmAhW0k4tFSG)**

I want to share your words of support with the President. I want to share your concerns. I want to share the reasons **YOU** want to defeat Tammy Baldwin. I want to give you an opportunity to share whatever is most important to you.

[**Write a message now. I’ll share your concerns with the President.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=be5925dd59b6422e904e0b9972d728e3&_e=DL3ESNTI1_-Y09e94PhgGVSNC9QVV229oPLJGggGsAoSACdG6VA50PmIvyJ20MQMlx_qv2jgVHRUx2HZ0aMEAdulaipy1xJzB4VKo6W1TNsq0gX7o4TG8bP7SeLDlqqdWLy89HxWqoVWfqwdtoB3_z9__cClnkddedRk977JRtMozEb2c8WUAcPYrBzEI0se5RzmhiegF74CjNfnqdcbrUimtozEMdMLchXjVYlKrbwtPiIO7eL7Au_aejBb3XDkwDUmDroU0WBBRAHh8bnd3KJMlKyDRAauR17DJDaQI9K9o-FmyhyAOL1GRfAsRbrnnLCi_2DwnkrVwCAWB0woghpd_gTiYSBSZWeMQultdyqD1YIW1GLz16hs6Vq-By0Co712_ZMIOcZsQBreIQiiGZ172GUqLemH-QaGQQdwss8vBZQEhqH3xb-dyu2IXdV0)

This is an exciting time for Wisconsin, friend. Tonight’s rally is going to be something you’ll want to watch.

We’re well on our way to drumming up the support needed to make sure Baldwin never steps foot in the Senate ever again.

\- Leah

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=be5925dd59b6422e904e0b9972d728e3&_e=sJyBCfr23BDGvHsvwNX3ZGB5bpDKqDltNFL0CH_UL_NVIPWvan-UTqYsCutJdzcBi59Vj-HG96BE-K0w95mk_gclN9NNGNJqXlzvD5INlZ6yTxOEmixBqUY7pTK2DztxRUreyqbHXCsC5x3pIyv8Ai5ssEiDG3ins3h4OYEcz5YHWh2uDNcBIxAQETB5LkGeXCCGLiA63kkyjReAlnUWlWSw3cCfqNg2U2C9tyvgaNK7KvzVRk3KxmTaHJGaPsTV). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=be5925dd59b6422e904e0b9972d728e3&_e=DL3ESNTI1_-Y09e94PhgGb_IWjFYV8jqNcYU034-9VBxzPlstCfr1fiZEJud5jADgj9TVs4_om6YKN-RNcGroBC9y5GKe0Hh3TEIwQLzUm2ft_HNWa0YNHwNs2U7PXfiHG7zdH8SJI6c7_8jPwd1ELqZA-VePt0UTKjIprISbZ8miWwO2HHXF3yF8Scc5bTrBppjmC5apDeDIcHFVpsBC653QJxPYU0eWzRkqGI1JmLC6Hdtd1RuTYGNuXo_SJP72giO0jiIul7rO9GnRsx9Zfj28lJXqr8lXNJqnyEHzYbtxsgswtyENDacRAeQMbNtkjMLTDcwxJB6XCni3xZ0TV42sX1USphppeR7SfG1k0EGKcCGPvGJnCvBaYQVTd-b) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=be5925dd59b6422e904e0b9972d728e3&_e=DL3ESNTI1_-Y09e94PhgGb_IWjFYV8jqNcYU034-9VC7CVtmrPuqtzqVlrUoYlU9-_jqcaVUcqh_FfOQ0MV9sjo76bISIbVIzx5_HCRyh8FRhwo1_DvdBip0eGPLTq8oHPUNg_5QHYhWGMZgjR4IR8GkesroGOYkVkl5eNMQdYxPH7eeXDoQObnoF2qMu-wHKzhuRXrtZb2U99s_wEwRePx3rSOMBRESCQ4AZn1A0_-noVb3omToZRrYfimHZchWBJSORer6fLqkI-aRJUCZ2Je36eGBOIk_lDB17DE8YNNa5eIyxt2shfBscPj8qAdzKg5q_yg7rEgYBmfa0HNC3K7oAu3aQP1RC4_hjG5BbZxpuyzyHZpDBShR4LUa_8RG) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=be5925dd59b6422e904e0b9972d728e3&_e=DL3ESNTI1_-Y09e94PhgGd8xKRdWvlpF3t1k3bpdJkhogiMLfjjRnvc9AzA5Goi-CfzFkq_6x0YIrJgfd4nz2Pp0CXMYC6B5av_PdPiuevtN1o9BmC82rbAShpG5FZlUCJ4dh5la1Pu3EUFaNX3iD3UxFF29LPl95SiZcS39I5pHXNM51d2-pqoaXDVvkmmP3Onc85-n4b5QaRjLfA3KUXJFWZXxr1Bp4IbcNDwWXkP5mcHmMjHIc0V79Pa1K_fSxDVlJYS7XsYQVBZuZUJyfQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=be5925dd59b6422e904e0b9972d728e3&_e=DL3ESNTI1_-Y09e94PhgGVvf4d6M2AbI423nHBYNc3i_EMhSLo4CMrg2jOV13KXrt5d5VwARiZdJBU2Pn3TIUtyaTaXMYMaay8Y-H3fzWZsdR18F_dU2rWV95fYZOSvOaGJHlx9IJ9X0tWYos5-zAMVnvAUQ8-cC5f_FBOWu_REWwvp7Ooy-kbi6cM2AeutmNDDQnM2p_zPs2V5hS8qglpaOIZXZm6dp4S-am2NBe7y0WCb6YKRkiqKaB5di-F6dLk1EyPwlbN4ORLnNo3b0SQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=be5925dd59b6422e904e0b9972d728e3&_e=DL3ESNTI1_-Y09e94PhgGVYFKajdnbzHF-XpP7XMVcMuJhBAKDW5Cv8ThSsAfRaFzXSYT9A2q302oq83MZV-0qbaoi2ZeLxhslo6jBuHpNOA2zOwGkNf2V9dZTyrr_ESfm99m2z3FwmRVBnfTs5Nh28LwZGraTrc6-YjnSKfVB71PsHm3VyoPjV9ARXTxfFLUAcOIoodzW2IolPXWHRSJGT7emXw0lO5HX2gR6NiKYh4FsYSIEsmFLvuv5RjYZrfBC1lk59NXdotuA68HgPxdw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=be5925dd59b6422e904e0b9972d728e3&_e=DL3ESNTI1_-Y09e94PhgGb_IWjFYV8jqNcYU034-9VCobHMx7_Y72dYLKBju1DiSJRLle6P9YAArDuhOQxTXBeinGBn3Q_a7tsNJqymcIamps-Yn4rCqELLTpRjRwJWvuHTdHfgAXc9EKz3i2tgBlHf-2dBberqSNbSQ6USVGzBLjB8jZi4d4_9A4tzYVtw7xZSUkxngxRoMfOwABiggAZMp-DzoPEg7558fBrgATw0tzk7EIXvwfVCS5z0VHl6OJvRW__a6YP1g6hJ2ZARnlNXYJc1jjZb2nR-m-BeiXa9c_3jljxq2zI29xGK13u42dBhRxQOO-NkWTwdadkSEH3_HvC1PQVcqIBT6gzDnvD7X7-rbLjsxtvP75Hay6qYykg19xn04EKbv-b0wmf3LtQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=be5925dd59b6422e904e0b9972d728e3&_e=sJyBCfr23BDGvHsvwNX3ZGB5bpDKqDltNFL0CH_UL_NVIPWvan-UTqYsCutJdzcBi59Vj-HG96BE-K0w95mk_gclN9NNGNJqXlzvD5INlZ6yTxOEmixBqUY7pTK2DztxRUreyqbHXCsC5x3pIyv8Ai5ssEiDG3ins3h4OYEcz5YHWh2uDNcBIxAQETB5LkGeXCCGLiA63kkyjReAlnUWlWSw3cCfqNg2U2C9tyvgaNK7KvzVRk3KxmTaHJGaPsTV) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=be5925dd59b6422e904e0b9972d728e3&_e=sJyBCfr23BDGvHsvwNX3ZGB5bpDKqDltNFL0CH_UL_NVIPWvan-UTqYsCutJdzcBi59Vj-HG96BE-K0w95mk_gclN9NNGNJqXlzvD5INlZ6yTxOEmixBqUY7pTK2DztxRUreyqbHXCsC5x3pIyv8Ai5ssEiDG3ins3h4OYEcz5YHWh2uDNcBIxAQETB5LkGeXCCGLiA63kkyjReAlnUWlWSw3cCfqNg2U2C9tyvgaNK7KvzVRk3KxmTaHJGaPsTV) to unsubscribe. | | Yes, this is a message about fundraising. The rest of this message will be asking you to contribute toward our $218,000 October goal. I'm asking so we can keep our efforts, up and down the ticket, going through Election Day. name: Jason Yates
subject: Huckabee explains how to respond to media bias
body:
Peter,
I want to make sure you’ve read Gov. Mike Huckabee’s thoughts on the extreme media bias we are experiencing in our culture.
He has summarized the situation in a way that only Huckabee can and he has provided practical points to help us respond.
**“ _We are, by almost every measure, living in the safest, healthiest, most prosperous time in our nation’s history. Yet the left has millions of people convinced that the apocalypse is upon us because the 2016 election didn’t turn out as they hoped._ ” – Mike Huckabee **
Take a few minutes to read his article, [How to Respond to Media Bias](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPQbMissRD2xCDS-jAm3qJuUb1aEvjzK-q8-lRiJ0v1njmFVi5zYRtGTnNV37SDk_4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181024com01&n=1), and forward it on to your friends and family!
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPQbMissRD2xCDS-jAm3qJuUb1aEvjzK-q8-lRiJ0v1njmFVi5zYRtGTnNV37SDk_4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181024com01&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181024com01&n=3)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181024com01&n=4).

name: Dana Bye
subject: 10 counties in 10 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Abigail has made traveling all around the 7th district to hear from Virginia families a priority throughout this campaign. And 13 days out from the election, it's still our top priority, which is why we launched a 10-day tour of all 10 counties in VA-7 today.
| | Peter, Our community deserves a representative who is accountable and committed to consensus-building. That's why Abigail has made traveling all around the 7th district to hear from Virginia families a priority throughout this campaign. And 13 days out from the election, it's still our top priority, **which is why we launched a 10-day tour of all 10 counties in VA-7 today.** [**Can you make a donation, Peter, to support Abigail and our team as we travel the district in the final stretch of this race?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/q-e4bX1kKTiCj9xx_UPMEyLUrxQRM6h_04sulOf3F0I=/UEw5ek7yvEac8LxgERpEq-6FMEUr-WRTIcTK3wwsUds=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.24_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/q-e4bX1kKTiCj9xx_UPMEyLUrxQRM6h_04sulOf3F0I=/UEw5ek7yvEac8LxgERpEq-6FMEUr-WRTIcTK3wwsUds=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.24_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Our Coffee with the Candidate this morning in Amelia!_ We'll be hosting events throughout the district's 10 counties so Abigail can meet with more voters, listen to their ideas and concerns -- **and, we hope, persuade many of them to vote for her!** But implementing this ambitious schedule will take resources, so we are counting on [**your support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/q-e4bX1kKTiCj9xx_UPMEyLUrxQRM6h_04sulOf3F0I=/UEw5ek7yvEac8LxgERpEq-6FMEUr-WRTIcTK3wwsUds=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.24_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) to power us through. This is a tied race in a historically Republican district, Peter, so there is a good chance the final result will come down to a handful of votes. **The voters Abigail meets over the next 10 days could very well swing the race in our direction --[so chip in to support our efforts if you can.](https://act.myngp.com/el/q-e4bX1kKTiCj9xx_UPMEyLUrxQRM6h_04sulOf3F0I=/UEw5ek7yvEac8LxgERpEq-6FMEUr-WRTIcTK3wwsUds=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.24_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)** Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/q-e4bX1kKTiCj9xx_UPMEyLUrxQRM6h_04sulOf3F0I=/UEw5ek7yvEac8LxgERpEq-6FMEUr-WRTIcTK3wwsUds=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.24_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/q-e4bX1kKTiCj9xx_UPMEyLUrxQRM6h_04sulOf3F0I=/UEw5ek7yvEac8LxgERpEq-6FMEUr-WRTIcTK3wwsUds=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/q-e4bX1kKTiCj9xx_UPMEyLUrxQRM6h_04sulOf3F0I=/uWGtw79DNhHS6_fc3rn08YKN4A01VI-pHaV72ovq-o8=)_

name: Bob Casey
subject: too much on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7cd3/51dbcc2a/17915496/3adfcc0/874398083/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Team:

We _cannot_ stop fighting. Not when the Trump administration decided to pass a massive tax break for the wealthiest 1%, not when Senate Republicans are coming after protections for people with pre-existing conditions and not when far-right special interests sold out the middle class.

Every time Republicans in Washington have decided to put working families last, I have fought with both fists up to put those families first. Now, with 13 days until Election Day, I need your help to keep fighting. To really put a stop to the GOP's almost unchecked power, we need to elect a Democratic Senate majority, and we can't do that if I lose.

If Republicans hold on to the majority, we can expect them to continue their assault on protections for people with pre-existing conditions, continue to pass tax laws that make it harder for families to get ahead and even follow through on their threats to decimate Medicaid and Medicare. We can't let that happen.

I've been a firewall against the Trump administration's most dangerous and divisive pieces of legislation, but I can't keep fighting without your help. **Will you join me in this fight by making a donation to my campaign today? There 's too much at risk to lose this year.**

**_[secure.bobcasey.com/fight-back](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181024_fr1_nd_pa&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

| | If you'll be away from home on Election Day, you need to request your absentee ballot now to make sure you're able to vote.

name: Heidi Heitkamp
subject: big announcement (match alert!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends - This is BAD. After Mitch McConnell told The Washington Post that the battle for Senate control hinges on North Dakota, 23 right-wing groups are spending more than ** _$10 million_** to defeat me.
Now, a RealClearPolitics analysis shows us losing to my extremist opponent. **And if we lose here in North Dakota, Democrats have ZERO chance at taking back the Senate. **
**But luckily, a group of generous donors offered to DOUBLE ALL GIFTS to our campaign to hit our HUGE $50,000 weekly goal.****[Donate $5 or more (becomes $10) to protect North Dakota's Democratic Senate seat.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk931-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
****
Here's why I'm reaching out: Democrats can take back the Senate this year - but ONLY if we win here in North Dakota. **So whether we take full advantage of this match opportunity will determine control of the Senate for the next two years.

**But time's running out, and we're still WAY short of what we need to win in North Dakota. **These rare match offers don't come around all the time, so if Democrats want to take back the Senate by winning in North Dakota, it's mission critical we take full advantage of this match opportunity.
**Friends, I'm counting on your immediate contribution: [W](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk931-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)****[ill you rush $5 or more right now- every dollar you can - and get your gift DOUBLED to win in North Dakota and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk931-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Heidi Heitkamp and Jeanne Shaheen:_ | | | [$5 becomes $10](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk931-bu-nd&express_lane=true&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)

| | [$25 becomes $50](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk931-bu-nd&express_lane=true&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
---
| | [$50 becomes $100](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk931-bu-nd&express_lane=true&amount=50&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
---
| | [Or donate another amount!](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk931-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)

Thank you,

Heidi

clean_body: | | | Friends - This is BAD. After Mitch McConnell told The Washington Post that the battle for Senate control hinges on North Dakota, 23 right-wing groups are spending more than $10 million to defeat me. Now, a RealClearPolitics analysis shows us losing to my extremist opponent. And if we lose here in North Dakota, Democrats have ZERO chance at taking back the Senate. But luckily, a group of generous donors offered to DOUBLE ALL GIFTS to our campaign to hit our HUGE $50,000 weekly goal. Here's why I'm reaching out: Democrats can take back the Senate this year - but ONLY if we win here in North Dakota. So whether we take full advantage of this match opportunity will determine control of the Senate for the next two years. But time's running out, and we're still WAY short of what we need to win in North Dakota. These rare match offers don't come around all the time, so if Democrats want to take back the Senate by winning in North Dakota, it's mission critical we take full advantage of this match opportunity. Friends, I'm counting on your immediate contribution: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Heidi Heitkamp and Jeanne Shaheen: | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Heidi | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Shaheen for Senate Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Hey, I reject that
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3629/9e00690/55b63cf6/24002734/2586107989/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181024_EVotF2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&source=em18_181024_EVotF2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx")
Friends,

In Donald Trump's America, we've been led to believe that we've got to step on our neighbor's shoulder and get in their face and get on their backs in order to get ahead.

Well, I reject that.

Since I was a little boy, I've carried with me the words my grandmother repeated to me on my way to school each day. "Andrew," she would say, "Go to school, mind your teachers, get your lesson, and one day, bring your education home."

What my grandmother was communicating to me was that it wasn't just about me, it was about all of us.

And if all of us come together and vote, if we stand up and say we deserve better and we want better, we can build the Florida we all deserve.

We can expand access to affordable, quality healthcare for over 800,000 Floridians and protect those with preexisting conditions. We can invest in our students and our schools, and pay our teachers what they're worth. We can grow our economy with good-paying jobs and clean up our environment.

But only if we all do our part by turning out to vote.

**[Listen, if we're going to build a better future for all Floridians, I need your help. Chip in $5 or more before October 26th to help fund our Early Vote program.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3629/9e00690/55b63cf6/240027cc/2586107989/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-early-vote-fund?gpsid=13_55_4647&refcode=em18_181024_EVotF2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_EVotF2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+FIRSTNAMEListen+if+were+going+to+build+a")**

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3629/9e00690/55b63cf6/240027cf/2586107989/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-early-vote-fund?gpsid=13_55_4647&refcode=em18_181024_EVotF2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_EVotF2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3629/9e00690/55b63cf6/240027ce/2586107989/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=11+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_181024_EVotF2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3629/9e00690/55b63cf6/240027c1/2586107989/VEsHBw/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=12+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_181024_EVotF2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&source=em18_181024_EVotF2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3629/9e00690/55b63cf6/240027c0/2586107989/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=13+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_181024_EVotF2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&source=em18_181024_EVotF2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx")
