name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: President Trump’s message on today’s despicable acts
body:
| |
---
The White House • October 24, 2018
## **President Trump’s message on today’s despicable acts**
**“The full weight of our government is being deployed** to conduct this investigation and bring those responsible for these despicable acts to justice,” President Donald J. Trump said from the White House East Room today. “This egregious conduct is abhorrent to everything we hold dear and sacred as Americans.” **“In these times we have to unify**. We have to come together.” [**Watch President Trump’s message.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2NzE5NDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjcxOTQ5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1NTQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1055170989682757632) **President signs historic, $6 billion antidrug law** **“One year ago, I addressed the Nation in this very room** , and declared the opioid crisis a National Public Health Emergency,” President Trump said today from the White House East Room. “We are here to update the American people on the historic action we have taken and to [**sign landmark legislation to defeat the opioid epidemic**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2NzE5NDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjcxOTQ5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1NTQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/ondcp-salutes-president-trumps-signing-historic-opioids-package/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d).” **The President worked closely with Congress** to advance the bipartisan SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Act of 2018, the largest legislative package ever passed to address a single drug crisis in America. The law combines a number of crucial provisions, including requirements to help the U.S. Postal Service and border officials stop deadly fentanyl from entering the United States from China and Mexico. **Since last October** , the Trump Administration has applied a three-part plan to help stop the opioid epidemic in its tracks:
* Reducing demand by educating Americans about the dangers of opioid misuse and curbing over-prescription
* Cutting off the flow of illicit drugs by cracking down on international and domestic supply chains that devastate our communities
* Helping those struggling with addiction by removing barriers to evidence-based treatment, prevention, and recovery services

[**The facts on President Trump’s three-part plan to fight the opioid epidemic**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2NzE5NDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjcxOTQ5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1NTQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-initiative-stop-opioid-abuse-reduce-drug-supply-demand-2/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Role models:** [**21 private organizations stepping up to take on drug abuse**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2NzE5NDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjcxOTQ5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1NTQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/year-historic-action-combat-opioid-crisis/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Video of the day: Rebekkah’s comeback story** **When Rebekkah was 14,** she blew out her ankle during cheerleading practice and was prescribed opioid painkiller pills. **Instead of getting better,** she quickly found herself addicted to powerful opioids and eventually turned to heroin. She’s far from alone: 80 percent of heroin users started with a prescription painkiller. Now, Rebekkah is regaining control of her life—and making her detox public to help others trapped in a dangerous cycle. [**Know the truth about opioids: Watch Rebekkah’s story**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2NzE5NDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjcxOTQ5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1NTQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://opioids.thetruth.com/o/articles/videos/rebekkahs-story)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks on “A Year of Historic Progress and Action to Combat the Opioid Crisis” from the White House East Room** | October 24, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2NzE5NDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjcxOTQ5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1NTQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2NzE5NDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjcxOTQ5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1NTQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI0Ljk2NzE5NDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNC45NjcxOTQ5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1NTQ0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
---

body:
In case you missed it last week, we have some very positive news to share: Tom earned the endorsement of the Tucson Daily Star's editorial board! Their endorsement was kind and it was enthusiastic.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.

Take a look at what the Daily Star had to say about Tom, team **[(and then make a grassroots donation so we can share the news with voters in our district)](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.24_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer="). **_Their endorsement was kind and it was enthusiastic:_ [](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.24_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") The Daily Star's endorsement recognizes Tom for his hard work reaching across the aisle to deliver results for Arizona families. Unlike Wendy Rogers, a right-wing extremist who wants to take away your Social Security, Tom is an independent voice for our district, and we must re-elect him so he can keep standing up for us in Congress. This endorsement comes at an important time for our campaign, team. Rogers and the Republican Super PACs boosting her campaign are claiming momentum in our race, and they are desperate to unseat Tom. **This endorsement will help us persuade the remaining undecided voters in our district to re-elect Tom in 13 days.** **[Join the Daily Star in endorsing Tom with a donation to support his re-election today>>](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.24_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks, Team O'Halleran | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

_I’m all in for the Sixth District._

**I’ve spent nearly my entire life in the Sixth District and I’m proud of that. My wife Denise and I raised our family here. We’ve created jobs in the 6th.**

I am passionate about serving my community.

I have the same calling now that I did in 1979 when I joined the Marine Corps.

I’m Ready to Serve, Again because I want to bring Hoosier values to Washington, make it easier for businesses to grow and create jobs, and tirelessly advocate for our veterans.

**[Watch our new ad ‘Ready to Serve, Again’ here>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=449b2418df594cce989e9c9683f41f2b&_e=G9qXSO-DvOmiBCb2zjs_znzp2LjpIqC2WkJQnTQnz63ahXjpuSOm6NNUrpcTY5Fdrf-IO9UlYsFgGX_jX4QEn7kwZmQKIbwxnPoIe1LqXcjDKJAEKmict7dvEzsX_xathDXgtZXBolzMr3JY0Nrh7ZEEEDwkjuZC_2hVb8K3I-xgKYr0Mbhx4CSbGlEFFXfmGABkM385RsEuGZFH5di2bqQE-oUqRxxwOEoYTVTxYFygYAi9JyhaMM7CcrxF3j_l6SFYqz8xklGAY6wxzWjlgU-OkDNCXV3DEyMsa64IlXppJ2wix5mk1kqOhsFKdpKDclKKuPgRjujXLldfY75n37wAuYm6IcFByDs0bZSmW5YbgWaYwig_Oxh2inSmQvYmvmguPVH0oWOBLj9otwEPsHYpE9aURAzUWbkreJ5-UYHvH79DhlH7-92rY2hWYYyh)**

However, I can’t accomplish our priorities without your help on Election Day.

**Election Day is now less than 2 WEEKS AWAY, and I need your vote to lead us to victory.**

**Polls are open 6:00 AM to 6:00 PM on Tuesday, November 6.**

As a Marine officer, I understand respect is earned, never given, and I hope I’ve earned your vote.

As your Sixth District Congressman, I will keep my oath -- _I’m Ready To Serve, Again!_

I’m Ready to Serve, Again!
Greg Pence

name: John Shimkus
subject: Join me – end the opioid epidemic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus
body:
The opioid epidemic is ravaging our nation, and has had an especially devastating impact on Illinois. Since 2008, opioid overdoses have killed nearly
[](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=893babb7e086483992c82c9ee3d3a445&_e=7tmH_NaZuxmfgsiYr7-kOtc7hbwD-LxphUULJNk4o7Mh2F-zNQZ4njc4dC0OESOJvd4aXy_33V4gKA4VhiuniKLWw_YQL-XHp07mmKqDiVxCRPn5j3cGlpUdo6LkR-JHOGEC8R-MfpzQCPvKorvM8H5sBYoKAm4T6AiG_oiMB2qkM1kMlA-nNLaP0gDDvgyg84n2e60F4MopA2tCWc-3uLaUPiysSyDjNzM6rO-RD-k6gX_l81Fu8n1On8l4Etzk_PIVvAtO3hWUSyNJQuYBRpAR_DctvPyJ_Ua_oT1K3RMhO6h-n2Es2m90tbZPNp0zqBvfi7duTVGVKnEdGaVt-n4_FFeLPWvCi1lTnTJNO4gaC8Fx_QzDuBoAXMDKyoYBZ4LiIytqhJbjB_Bmf1_8gw%3D%3D)
Friend,

The opioid epidemic is ravaging our nation, and has had an especially devastating impact on Illinois. Since 2008, opioid overdoses have killed nearly 11,000 Illinoisans, prematurely ending bright futures and tearing apart families.

But, thankfully, help is on the way.

Just today, President Trump signed a bipartisan anti-opioid abuse package, promising better treatment for those with opioid addictions, and new safeguards to make the dangerous drugs less accessible. Today is the beginning of the end of opioid abuse and addiction.

Today, to acknowledge the great step forward we’ve made to end the epidemic, I’m asking you to join me in remembering its victims.

We all know someone feeling the effects of this terrible crisis, whether in our own families, or those of friends and neighbors. We’ve heard stories of futures cut short and loved ones taken all too soon.

To honor them, I’m asking you to share a memory of a loved one, or a few words of support for those struggling with addiction. By gathering your stories in the comments on my Facebook page, we can spread awareness throughout our community, and make sure anyone struggling knows where to turn for help.
[Share your Story](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=893babb7e086483992c82c9ee3d3a445&_e=7tmH_NaZuxmfgsiYr7-kOkLVKByb5lCYmAEX6y6lM85ZLn71oAISwUMPo4Xgkrd4XeCMJ_2QzNB2LCLS5XlFdb6S-YZkMwEFsz_kFrQqlMbAfEKSCl-Z_pzx7uviPPtpVqb_t_gu0CKNbPK5uJUdSsxTJWvD83kV4QyQV9L6OkhGWe_Qwq2H3U36GAGW5wHiUreDR1Lyu51wBqVznwFVpdipLFIBGnwZOYLnkENhNIb7cGendVqMpm4PZIooK3yDzTOHmSHY874EYAYOHMLKWPiA_d3JZviKKyrVwHyjTb3jt8Sayz94ttnke9y8M59Kd4E54eMhRc-LOAzVFD8vjw%3D%3D)
---
If we work together, we have the ability to prevent tragic, avoidable opioid addiction-related deaths not only here in Illinois, but around the country. This new legislation signed by President Trump is an incredible first step in ending addiction.

I hope that you will join me **[by leaving a brief note in the comments](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=893babb7e086483992c82c9ee3d3a445&_e=7tmH_NaZuxmfgsiYr7-kOkLVKByb5lCYmAEX6y6lM85ZLn71oAISwUMPo4Xgkrd4XeCMJ_2QzNB2LCLS5XlFdb6S-YZkMwEFsz_kFrQqlMbAfEKSCl-Z_pzx7uviPPtp_v9JZSOBIV0JUQbPKnUnlBOIoeOUlhft83VjHGDtwYrS3IcxInp-4tblX8sja6K9IERJlUbHMGrmB4cDutsBLdDJWbh1GCljr0-b5h30HNTY5oaLvxsSd6WjodEP5voRG0xeoisFIsdCAj8QdP0iusb09HtK0y0wLgLlnOzHttBYFX-LnxYH75AbJFRBa4lLMg7eZ6RJEUdIDu5JSlauTQ%3D%3D)** to spread awareness and honor the memory of all those we have lost.

Sincerely,

John

Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus.
---
[Unsubscribe](http://links.johnshimkus.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_s=893babb7e086483992c82c9ee3d3a445&_t=7aa1CMv3LWzsOGZHOMNseCo_d-tEWz-1RezerE2QYsUzMUocVgQMPVdvdbFEuyvFcBZc8t7KeysPh37oPMEmz--I5eBG6W8JcaG6LXw-5w5oecRYeNRPAnbJYjlinv9nBQSmMHoMKfa5nQY5CNk55V4KMsS5jDG4i0QVpT4ZgWM%3D)

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: You can help elect the first Black governor in a state Trump won in 2016
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Stacey's opponent, Georgia's sitting secretary of state, has purged over 500,000 voter registrations to rig this election for himself and the corporate donors bankrolling his campaign.
#
Friends,
Stacey Abrams is the type of candidate who is poised to transform the great state of Georgia. Transformation is exactly what we need in this country - state by state. That is why Our Revolution is standing strongly with Stacey Abrams.
But this race is not only about Stacey Abrams. This race is about fighting for a vision, it is about lifting people up from all walks of life, across all backgrounds. As many of you know, the President of the United States is stoking the flames of bigotry and hatred amongst the American people:
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a87e/bed43eb/8e477851/75fc1344/1163723512/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-abrams?refcode=em181024-full&noskip=true")
President Donald Trump, however, is far from Stacey Abrams' only obstacle. **Stacey's opponent, Georgia's sitting secretary of state, has purged over 500,000 voter registrations to rig this election for himself and the corporate donors bankrolling his campaign.** At a private campaign event last Friday, he said that Stacey Abrams' voter turnout operation "continues to concern us, especially if everybody uses and exercises their right to vote." **We need to Get Out The Vote with every single eligible voter we can reach.**
**[Can you send $5 right now to help Stacey Abrams' campaign and Our Revolution Get Out The Vote in Georgia? We need to fight back against this attack on the right to vote with everything we have got.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a87e/bed43eb/8e477851/75fc1344/1163723512/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-abrams?refcode=em181024-full&noskip=true")**
Stacey Abrams comes from a strong tradition of democratic activism. With parents who were ministers and Civil Rights protesters, and with role models like Congresswomen Barbara Jordan and Shirley Chisholm, Stacey Abrams is charting a new path of leadership, not only for Black women but also for people from all walks of life. Her policies are informed by her own lived experiences as a college graduate with student loan debt and a woman whose own family has been hurt by a broken criminal justice system. She will advance legislation that gets at the heart of what everyday people struggle with.
Our Revolution local groups and the grassroots movement behind Abrams' campaign are making history. We are showing the people of Georgia, our country, and the entire world that progressive values like love, inclusion, and equal representation will defeat voter suppression, discrimination, and unchecked greed. **It is time to reclaim our power.**
Friends, we are in a moment of transcendence. To transform this nation and bend the moral arc of the universe toward justice requires us to get comfortable with being uncomfortable. It requires us to overcome long odds and discrimination, as the heroes of generations past did in winning the right to vote. **Their sacrifice, giving their lives, bodies, and freedom for the right to vote, has been undermined by the Supreme Court's undoing of the Voting Rights Act. It is up to you, the people, to VOTE.**
**[Split a $5 donation to Stacey Abrams' grassroots campaign and Our Revolution so that we can Get Out The Vote in Georgia and win the race for governor.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a87e/bed43eb/8e477851/75fc1344/1163723512/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-abrams?refcode=em181024-full&noskip=true")**
We have less than two weeks until Election Day. I am doing everything in my power to turn out every single voter and build the grassroots momentum we need to bring the political revolution to the ballot box on November 6. I hope you are ready to join me.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

This race is about fighting for a vision, it is about lifting people up from all walks of life, across all backgrounds. name: Paul Begala
subject: Jeez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I know what you're thinking--"Paul, that's never gonna happen. Corey's never gonna beat Tim Kaine." But let me ask you this: What did you think was going to happen in the 2016 presidential election? -
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Corey Stewart.

Jeez, where do I even begin with this guy?

Well, first let's back up and start with this one critical fact: **If Republicans hold on to their majorities, they are coming for your health care.** They're coming to repeal the ACA, ending protections for people with pre-existing conditions, to slash Medicare, and they're coming to cut Social Security. They're doing it to fund their mega tax cut for special interests--Mitch McConnell has explicitly said as much in recent days.

And we know, beyond a shadow of a doubt, that if Corey Stewart by some cruel twist of fate unseats Tim Kaine, he will vote with McConnell to do all that. [If that right there is enough for you to decide to donate to stop him--and to be frank, it should be--you can do that by clicking this link and contributing to the Kaine campaign's critical end-of-October goal.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10cf/3e0906/74b9ab91/3e37d68a/693953722/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+If+that+right+there+is+enough+for+you+to&utm_campaign=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&source=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide")

I know what you're thinking--_" Paul, that's never gonna happen. Corey's never gonna beat Tim Kaine."_ But let me ask you this: What did you think was going to happen in the 2016 presidential election? I, for one, did not think we'd wake up on November 9th to an ongoing national nightmare. Yet here we are. **_So there 's no taking anything for granted._** The tens of millions of Americans who rely on the Affordable Care Act--and the thousands more here in Virginia about to get health care through Medicaid expansion--can't afford that.

**What else is there to say about Corey Stewart? Well, he 's not just your average conservative Republican who can't wait to take away health care and Social Security.** He's _also_ a confederate sympathizer and a white supremacist apologist (yes, he palled around with the organizer of the Charlottesville neo-Nazi rally) who will stop at NOTHING to smear Tim Kaine's name and reputation.

To wit: In the past month or so, Corey Stewart has been posting digital videos with some of the craziest, most baseless, bizarre attacks I've seen--and I've been in politics for a very long time. _And just last week we learned that he actually raised more than a million bucks in the third quarter, so it 's possible that he's going to take these little videos and put them up on TVs across Virginia._

**Corey Stewart, with his newly minted war chest, is going on offense. It 's OUR job to keep him on defense.**

That's why I'm emailing you today. I need you to step up and chip in a few bucks to Tim Kaine. Tim is as good a guy as I've ever seen in elected office--he fights for the most vulnerable among us, he believes in hard work and knows the value of an honest dollar, and he is committed to getting things done that help folks. [I'm proud he's my Senator and I know he's got your back--do you have his?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10cf/3e0906/74b9ab91/3e37d689/693953722/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Irsquom+proud+hersquos+my+Senator+and+I+&utm_campaign=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&source=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide")

**Earlier today, the Kaine campaign announced that they need to raise $80,000 by the end of October so Tim can start November strong. We 've got one week to go 'til then. Please, click these buttons and pitch in whatever you can afford today. Whether it's five bucks or 500, every single cent is gonna get them closer to that critical goal:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10cf/3e0906/74b9ab91/3e37d688/693953722/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+5&utm_campaign=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&source=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide")
---
| [**$25**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10cf/3e0906/74b9ab91/3e37d68f/693953722/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+25&utm_campaign=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&source=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide")
---
| [**$50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10cf/3e0906/74b9ab91/3e37d68e/693953722/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+50&utm_campaign=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&source=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide")
---
| [**$100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10cf/3e0906/74b9ab91/3e37d68d/693953722/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+100&utm_campaign=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&source=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide")
---
| [**$250**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10cf/3e0906/74b9ab91/3e37d68c/693953722/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+250&utm_campaign=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&source=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10cf/3e0906/74b9ab91/3e37d683/693953722/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&source=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide")
---
Thanks a lot for reading this email and helping out. We're 13 days away from the election, so it's now or never--and I vote now.

_Paul Begala_

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10cf/3e0906/74b9ab91/3e37d685/693953722/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide&source=20181024_2_FR_PB_Begala-LDND-sendwide")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. body:

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: the most important election of our lifetime
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/R1vk0sCgERL-wZLGQoSZSd3DToRf62NSZf_gycC04Lw=/emCxaBcbhPRJhIoRbKxMPb2K-HlEBkc6GucHCuGxMxE=?gpsid=37_57_4692&refcode=em18_181024_2wksrs_LG_fnd_gq_nopn__SS&utm_campaign=em18_181024_2wksrs_LG_fnd_gq_nopn__SS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---
Hey friend,

I can't believe I'm saying this but there are less than two weeks left until Election Day. And after our rally with President Barack Obama Monday in Las Vegas, I'm fired up and ready to go!

President Obama told the crowd, **" this election is more important than any other of our lifetime,"** and he's not kidding. He's supporting our campaign because he knows just how much is at stake.

**[If you agree with President Obama that this election is crucial, then chip in $5 or more today to help us finish strong and win in November.](https://act.myngp.com/el/R1vk0sCgERL-wZLGQoSZSd3DToRf62NSZf_gycC04Lw=/emCxaBcbhPRJhIoRbKxMPb2K-HlEBkc6GucHCuGxMxE=?gpsid=37_57_4692&refcode=em18_181024_2wksrs_L1_fnd_gq_nopn__SS&utm_campaign=em18_181024_2wksrs_L1_fnd_gq_nopn__SS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/R1vk0sCgERL-wZLGQoSZSd3DToRf62NSZf_gycC04Lw=/emCxaBcbhPRJhIoRbKxMPb2K-HlEBkc6GucHCuGxMxE=?gpsid=37_57_4692&refcode=em18_181024_2wksrs_IG_fnd_gq_nopn__SS&utm_campaign=em18_181024_2wksrs_IG_fnd_gq_nopn__SS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso) [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/R1vk0sCgERL-wZLGQoSZSd3DToRf62NSZf_gycC04Lw=/emCxaBcbhPRJhIoRbKxMPb2K-HlEBkc6GucHCuGxMxE=?gpsid=37_57_4692&refcode=em18_181024_2wksrs_B1_fnd_gq_nopn__SS&utm_campaign=em18_181024_2wksrs_B1_fnd_gq_nopn__SS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
Early Vote is underway and our entire team is working hard to mobilize volunteers and get out the vote, but we have to keep fundraising, too.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: President Trump is Counting on You!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
** We need your commitment this Election Day. President Trump is counting on you! >>> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/internal-memo-braun-surges-ahead-in-poll-467513?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Friend,

I wanted to remind you that October 29 is the deadline to vote absentee this election. **We all know that things can happen on Election Day, but this year is too important to take any chances.**

Never voted by mail? That's okay! **[Click here to learn more about Indiana’s Vote by Mail program.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=90cb7b5ed6&e=1acd9bb3d6) **

Tens of thousands of Hoosiers vote by mail each year and many more don't make it to the polls, so please don't take any chances. [**Click here to download your ballot application AND RETURN IT TO YOUR COUNTY ELECTION BOARD IN PERSON OR BY MAIL**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ae2af8a42c&e=1acd9bb3d6). Instructions are included with this form.

I would hate for you to wake up on November 7 and realize that your non-vote may have kept Mike Braun out of the U.S. Senate. Please don't take that chance.

Let's make sure our team of proven Republican leaders continue to deliver results for Hoosiers. Let's make sure that you vote.

All the best,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
**🚨[Stand with our Party to KEEP INDIANA RED! Tap or click >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=24b778d07e&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

name: Grassroots Outreach (via Team Donnelly)
subject: Got a few minutes to spare?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
We need all hands on deck to help us pull off the largest midterm GOTV operation Indiana has ever seen. Here's how you can help: |
---
[]()

| | **Indiana is home to "one of the
tightest and most pivotal U.S. Senate races
in the country"**
_\-- Indy Star_ Hey Peter -- With less than two weeks until Election Day, Indiana's Senate race is a DEAD HEAT!

That means volunteers WILL make the difference between keeping Democrat Joe Donnelly in the Senate and replacing him with Mitch McConnell's puppet. We need _all hands on deck_ to help us pull off the largest midterm GOTV operation Indiana has ever seen. Here's how you can help:
* [**Sign up for a door-knocking shift.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d92/7377f838/2666f954/51f8b1ea/2399263898/VEsH/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/indems/?event_type=1&is_virtual=false") Research shows that in-person conversations are the **#1 way to increase turnout,** and they're most important right before Election Day!

* [**Call Hoosiers to remind them to vote.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d92/7377f838/2666f954/51f8b1e5/2399263898/VEsE/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/indems/?event_type=2&is_virtual=false") You can even do it from your own couch!

* [**Text out the vote.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d92/7377f838/2666f954/51f8b1e4/2399263898/VEsF/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/16xQiDuQStkHrswp4SUk-TWZOxZqiq2t7CVeSePm0Ytg/viewform?edit_requested=true") Not everyone is comfortable on the phone -- so try texting voters instead!

* [**Drive voters to the polls.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d92/7377f838/2666f954/51f8b1e7/2399263898/VEsC/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc1CuqI6xUEg0xVT9gvZWe2hxN2_O1xyYOsCJMxjzhoubwJ9w/viewform") Indiana Republicans are NOTORIOUS for suppressing the vote, and we need help to ensure every eligible Hoosier can cast their ballot!

Thanks Peter. Now let's win this thing!

\-- Team Donnelly
| **********[**DONATE!**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d92/7377f838/2666f954/51f8b1e6/2399263898/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-no-time-to-waste?refcode=20181024.4is&amount=20")**********
---

|
---

---

name: Tori Taylor
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Let me be direct: I have some bad news. National Republicans just announced they are spending an additional $616,000 to defeat Kathy.
|
---

| | Let me be direct: I have some bad news. News you don't want to receive two weeks before the election. And now we have to raise $10,000 by midnight. I'll ask you to contribute to this Rapid Response Fund, but first let me walk you through what's going on. Kathy handedly won last night's debate against Rep. Ted Budd. Our ground game has been incredible. This is the largest grassroots effort North Carolina's 13th District has ever seen. And thanks to the hard work of people like you, this race has been named a toss-up and has single-digit polling. But our chances of winning may quickly vanish. Here's why: **National Republicans just announced they are spending an additional $616,000 to defeat Kathy.** [**Now, I need you to donate $18 to our Rapid Response Fund.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427909/e3b7d3/5e95b3cf/25555bba/3369756462/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181024pm?refcode=kme181024pm_m") Make no mistake -- they're targeting Kathy for a reason. They know Ted Budd's in trouble and they need him to continue to be a rubber stamp for their agenda instead of putting North Carolina families first. [**Will you donate to fill our Rapid Response Fund? We are aiming to reach $10,000 by midnight tonight.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427909/e3b7d3/5e95b3cf/25555bba/3369756462/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181024pm?refcode=kme181024pm_m") In a post-_Citizens United_ world, anything is possible during the last two weeks. I don't know how many more millions will be poured into the state to smear Kathy's name. But what I do know is that Kathy won't win without your support. Rush in a contribution by using this link: [**www.kathymanning2018.com/rapidreponsetoday**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427909/e3b7d3/5e95b3cf/25555bba/3369756462/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181024pm?refcode=kme181024pm_m") Thanks, Tori Tori Taylor
Campaign Manager
Kathy Manning for Congress

name: Molly
subject: nobody left behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
Friends,

I'm running for governor so that I can fight for people who don't have anyone fighting for them - because I know what that feels like.** **
Growing up as one of 11 kids, I learned early on that for one of us to succeed, we all must succeed. **And that 's a philosophy I've taken with me my whole life.**
It's what guided me as a single mom, putting myself through college to create better opportunities for my kids - and it's how I'll lead as governor to create better opportunities for the people of New Hampshire. **For our state to thrive, no one can get left behind.**
**When we work together, we can accomplish anything. That's why I'm counting on your support right now:** **[Will you give $5- or whatever you can - to help me fight for you and your family as governor of New Hampshire?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a6c/d0ce7de/50fa6fb6/9cdcbb2/614798189/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjEwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk210-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I know firsthand how tough it can be to get ahead, and I'm tired of special interests taking priority over what matters most - you. That's why this campaign is fueled by grassroots momentum - not the dark money organizations who buy their influence in politics.
**But with only 13 days until the election, I need your help more than ever to make sure I can keep this campaign strong in the final weeks. Can you give $5 or more before midnight to help us hit our $7,500 goal and to help us build a New Hampshire that works for everyone?**
**I'm counting on you, friends:[Will you rush $5 or more before midnight - every dollar you can - to defeat Chris Sununu's corporate agenda and flip New Hampshire blue?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a6c/d0ce7de/50fa6fb6/9cdcbb2/614798189/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjEwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk210-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for your continued support,

Molly Kelly

_**“Even by the swampy standards of Washington, Democratic Senator Bob Menendez is a total disgrace.** ”_
“‘This election is not about me," he told the crowd. "It's about you and our country.’ Not exactly. New Jersey residents, in poll after poll, have expressed concern about the incumbent lawmaker, who [escaped a verdict](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=23eb118e834f4ce2b632a3e63903c386&_e=QewuhfuaeYV55mT4jsuRkh8hV-XtNSYXyjgrrLy_IfJyTtDkU78R7YkeDAzyfk3PHg2kQwT0wizPg3QaYaoAKgTQCTdJg69PUFu2COxQZEKXpM028D-misCpveQ4srvukh4iCL5tFHowwphFTJm4dgr2qWZIj8LjZr41v-A6LCiJ3tYKw2UgriF573Nq3qE65uaBsncCzL034puINbAbyl8n7zNTHjnkNwIHOi6v9h11TdbdKlo1lMdr76oKZN2V6vI6mVVJLj9hKTNF6XPC8jnDKkuX9UvwgmV5WWUCtmos8ic-fxsuFhsLMXHie1_rb249Kx-Cn6J4KcEDMi7lG73EsIFcUH1TP-vg3rOU76sjfNhv4-wgLETE5nXm-ltLLKq3q1td1kJNO0poRmJde7p2lBYmW4yg33XKBqc-53Ec4tOWiI73GpEZdDwSwUPFnP6cL6kyKNkEk15yLt0Y_eSyW1GgymNEzbHHhI5oxs4%3D) when his federal corruption trial ended in a mistrial last year.

name: Claire McCaskill
subject: can't give up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there, we're just 13 days out from this election, and I'm still trailing my opponent in the latest polls. That's why I asked Maggie if I could reach out. **If you've been waiting for the right time to give, this is it:[I'm counting on your donation of $3 or more to get us to the finish line and save Missouri's Democratic Senate seat!](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1f7/2a380d31/36573408/f166e4/1234045990/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0Y21jIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMjRfTVdINENNQy1DTUNfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4cmc?refcode=e20181024_MWH4CMC-CMC_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**
This race has been the toughest political fight of my life: Dark money groups are spending $20 million to defeat me, Trump has visited Missouri five times to campaign for Josh Hawley and every pundit says this is one of the seats most likely to flip red.**But here's my message for Hawley and the GOP:**
_I'm not giving up._
And neither are the thousands of grassroots supporters who have donated and become a part of this team. We know what we're up against: a Trump-McConnell lackey who is scheming right now to strip healthcare coverage from millions of Missourians with pre-existing conditions and will support a reckless trade war that cripples our farmers and manufacturers.
**But this race is too important to let up now. We need to fight as hard as we can every single day for the next 13 days. I don't want any of us waking up on November 7 wishing we had done more. That's why I'm asking for your help:**
[**Look, we have to raise $24,000 by midnight. Please rush $3 to defend Missouri's Democratic Senate seat before it's too late.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1f7/2a380d31/36573408/f166e5/1234045990/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0Y21jIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMjRfTVdINENNQy1DTUNfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4cmc?refcode=e20181024_MWH4CMC-CMC_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Every dollar you give (or don't give) today could be the difference between winning and losing on Election Day. Thanks for doing what you can.
Claire

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1f7/2a380d31/36573408/f166e6/1234045990/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0Y21jIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMjRfTVdINENNQy1DTUNfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4cmc?refcode=e20181024_MWH4CMC-CMC_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

body:

We just got more breaking news: a brand-new poll out this morning shows
that “Ted Cruz holds a slight lead” over Beto in our race for U.S. Senate.

With just under two weeks until Election Day, we’re running out of time to
close the gap between Beto and Cruz. We’re counting on your help to push
Beto to victory.

aisle told Beto he didn’t stand a chance of winning against Cruz --
especially without taking a dime from PACs. But thanks to tens of
thousands of grassroots supporters just like you who’ve stepped up and
worked hard, day in and day out, we’re within single digits. We’re on the
cusp of making history.

Across the state, thousands of volunteers are spending countless hours
talking to their friends, family members and neighbors about the
importance of this election. Because the stakes are just too high for
anyone to sit on the sidelines.

Now, every single day we have -- every single hour -- matters. We can’t
slow down. We have to leave everything on the field and do everything in
our power to win this race. The future of our state and our country is on
the line -- and we’ve only got two weeks to overcome this gap and elect
Beto to the Senate.

deep, and support our campaign with
a
$3
contribution today.

In an era where our politics are dominated by fear and division, Beto is
taking his positive, hopeful vision directly to the people of Texas -- and
every contribution you give, no matter what amount, helps make that
possible.

If we leave everything on the field, we can close the gap and win this
race.

clean_body: [1]Beto for Texas We just got more breaking news: a brand-new poll out this morning shows that “Ted Cruz holds a slight lead” over Beto in our race for U.S. Senate. With just under two weeks until Election Day, we’re running out of time to close the gap between Beto and Cruz. We’re counting on your help to push Beto to victory. [ ]Can you pitch in a contribution of $3 or more to help us reach our October fundraising goal? [ ]Contribute $3 » When we launched our race over a year ago, pundits on both sides of the aisle told Beto he didn’t stand a chance of winning against Cruz -- especially without taking a dime from PACs. But thanks to tens of thousands of grassroots supporters just like you who’ve stepped up and worked hard, day in and day out, we’re within single digits. We’re on the cusp of making history. Across the state, thousands of volunteers are spending countless hours talking to their friends, family members and neighbors about the importance of this election. Because the stakes are just too high for anyone to sit on the sidelines. Now, every single day we have -- every single hour -- matters. We can’t slow down. We have to leave everything on the field and do everything in our power to win this race. The future of our state and our country is on the line -- and we’ve only got two weeks to overcome this gap and elect Beto to the Senate. [ ]We can’t leave anything to chance. That’s why we’re asking you to dig deep, and support our campaign with a $3 contribution today. In an era where our politics are dominated by fear and division, Beto is taking his positive, hopeful vision directly to the people of Texas -- and every contribution you give, no matter what amount, helps make that possible. name: Bob Menendez
subject: (no subject)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend, I'm backstage right now at the _NJTV_ Studios in Newark.

I'm about to go on stage but I wanted to make sure you had a heads up about what is going to happen tonight.

Hugin has been spreading lies about me and seems committed to continuing to do so until the votes are counted on the 6th. Trump did this in 2016 and seems like the President told Hugin to use the same tactic on me.

I know you won't buy it but there might be some folks in the state that do.

I'm going to do all I can tonight to stop him but it's going to take a lot from our reserves. I know I've asked a lot this cycle but I think we can all agree, we can't let Trump/Hugin win this.

Sam helped me set up a quick "debate" fundraising link for you and I hope you'll help me one more time while I'm on stage tonight.

I hope to see your name friend, when we pull the report of contributors later tonight and I hope you'll tune in and cheer me on.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-debate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ce4/3af3c5d/39de593f/4ec30db7/978863632/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-debate?gpsid=5_73_4641&refcode=em18_181024_DbNite_fnd_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_DbNite_fnd_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonatemenendezdebat")

Thanks,

Bob

Sent from iPhone

| Paid for by Menendez for Senate

name: Scott Arceneaux, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Disappointed, but not surprised.
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb362d/9e00690/5595f3ce/24002e48/762840005/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181024_DuringLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__SA_ettx&source=em18_181024_DuringLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__SA_ettx")
Friends,

>From day one, Ron DeSantis let us know exactly where he was going to take this race -- and as we watch tonight's debate, it's clear he wants to stay in the gutter. I'm disappointed, but not surprised.

The thing is, Ron DeSantis only cares about the special interests. In Washington, he consistently voted for policies that furthered the interests of the wealthy and _against_ policies like the Affordable Care Act which has helped over 1.7 million Floridians. And DeSantis has surrounded himself with cronies who spread hatred, run divisive ads, and only care about lining their own pockets.

Spreading lies, running a campaign based solely on negative attacks, and cozying up to fringe extremists -- we deserve better, Florida. This November, we can change the status quo.

**[If you're fired up and ready to elect a true leader to the Governor's mansion, chip in today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb362d/9e00690/5595f3ce/24002e40/762840005/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-leadership-fl-debate?gpsid=13_55_4663&refcode=em18_181024_DuringLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__SA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_DuringLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__SA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+If+youre+fired+up+and+ready+to+elect+a+t")**

Smears from our opponents and lies to try and get ahead -- we know these attacks are going to get worse, and this debate is no different.

That's because they know we have the momentum to win -- and all they have is mudslinging and lies. **[Show them that Florida has what it takes to take back our state after 20 years of Republican control. Chip in today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb362d/9e00690/5595f3ce/24002e43/762840005/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-leadership-fl-debate?gpsid=13_55_4663&refcode=em18_181024_DuringLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__SA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_DuringLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__SA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+Show+them+that+Florida+has+what+it+takes")**

Thank you,

Scott Arceneaux
Senior Advisor
Andrew Gillum for Governor
